candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure; clearly labeled and populated across all years.

Cost line, not revenue; rejected.

candidates.why: Tax impact line, not revenue; rejected.

candidates.why: This is income, not SG&A expense; should be excluded per SG&A rules.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list: primary gross interest expense first, then lease-related and ‘other’ components, with net interest as last fallback.

candidates.why: Partial component of equity; not total equity attributable to owners.
Subcomponent of equity (APIC-like), not total equity; rejected.
Appears to be a subtotal/alternative presentation, but not clearly the main total equity line.
Main total equity line; no separate non-controlling interests disclosed, so best proxy for book equity attributable to owners.
Represents the same total as Total Equity; ambiguous wording, so prefer ‘Total Equity’ and set MIB to 0.

variables.notes: No separate non-controlling interest line exists; per instructions, use ‘Total Equity’ for BE and set MIB to []. ‘Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest’ appears duplicative of Total Equity.

candidates.why: Label suggests inclusion of minority interest but is numerically equal to Total Equity with no separate NCI line; using it for MIB would double count equity.

variables.notes: No distinct minority interest/non-controlling interest line is presented on the balance sheet; therefore MIB is set to 0 as instructed when only a total equity figure is available.
